---
description: Compress and summarize spec artifacts to reduce context token usage during
  long autonomous runs — produces a compact handoff document for the next phase
---


<!-- Extension: pro -->
<!-- Config: .specify/extensions/pro/ -->
# SpecKit Pro — Context Compression

Compress and summarize spec artifacts into a compact `context-summary.md` that reduces token consumption for subsequent agent iterations. Especially useful before starting the implement loop or when the context feels saturated.

## User Input

```text
$ARGUMENTS
```

Optional:
- `--phase <name>` — compress for a specific next phase (tailors what to include)
- `--force` — regenerate even if `context-summary.md` already exists
- `--verbose` — show token estimates before and after

## When to Use

Run this command when:
- About to start the implement loop on a complex feature
- After many clarification rounds have expanded spec.md significantly
- When an agent reports context saturation (`<!-- Context: HIGH -->`)
- Before handing off between agents or agent sessions

## Detection

1. Run `.specify/scripts/bash/check-prerequisites.sh --json` to detect `FEATURE_DIR`.
2. Check if `<FEATURE_DIR>/context-summary.md` exists — if so and `--force` not given, output:
   ```
   [Pro] context-summary.md already exists. Use --force to regenerate.
   ```

## Compression Process

Read all available artifacts from `<FEATURE_DIR>`:

| Artifact | Compression Strategy |
|---|---|
| `spec.md` | Extract: feature name, user stories list (title + priority only), acceptance criteria (bulleted) |
| `plan.md` | Extract: tech stack, architecture decisions, key component list |
| `data-model.md` | Extract: entity names and key fields only |
| `research.md` | Extract: final decisions and version pins only |
| `tasks.md` | Extract: phase names, completed count, remaining tasks (titles only) |
| `contracts/` | Extract: endpoint names and signatures only |
| `progress.md` | Extract: last 3 iteration summaries |
| `session.md` | Extract: current phase and status |

## Output Format

Write to `<FEATURE_DIR>/context-summary.md`:

```markdown
# Context Summary
> Generated by SpecKit Pro Compress | <ISO timestamp>
> Original artifacts: ~<N> tokens → Summary: ~<M> tokens (<compression_ratio>% reduction)

## Feature
**Name**: <feature name>
**Branch**: <git branch>
**Phase**: <current phase>

## User Stories (Priority Order)
1. [P1] <story title> — <one-line summary>
2. [P2] <story title> — <one-line summary>
...

## Tech Stack
- <framework>: <version>
- <database>: <version>
- <key library>: <purpose>

## Architecture Decisions
- <decision 1>
- <decision 2>

## Data Model (Key Entities)
- `<Entity>`: <key fields>
- `<Entity>`: <key fields>

## Implementation Progress
- **Completed**: <N>/<total> tasks (<percentage>%)
- **Current phase**: <phase name>
- **Remaining phases**: <list>

## Remaining Tasks (Titles Only)
### <Phase N>
- [ ] <task title>
- [ ] <task title>

## Recent Context (Last 3 Iterations)
- Iter <N>: <one-line summary>
- Iter <N-1>: <one-line summary>
- Iter <N-2>: <one-line summary>

## Key Constraints & Gotchas
<3-5 bullet points of important constraints from spec, plan, or progress>
```

## Token Estimate (--verbose)

If `--verbose` is provided, estimate and display token counts:

```
[Pro] Context Compression Report:
  spec.md:          ~4,200 tokens → compressed ~380 tokens
  plan.md:          ~2,800 tokens → compressed ~290 tokens
  tasks.md:         ~1,500 tokens → compressed ~220 tokens
  progress.md:      ~3,100 tokens → compressed ~180 tokens
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Total original:   ~11,600 tokens
  context-summary:  ~1,070 tokens  (91% reduction)
```

(Use rough estimates: 1 token ≈ 4 characters)

## Usage in Loop

The `speckit.pro.loop` command will automatically load `context-summary.md` (if present) instead of full artifacts when:
- Iteration > 5 (after several rounds of context accumulation)
- OR `<!-- Context: HIGH -->` marker found in `progress.md`

## Output

```
[Pro] Context compressed ✓
  Output:      <FEATURE_DIR>/context-summary.md
  Reduction:   ~<N>% token savings estimated
  Recommended: Use /pro.loop or /pro.resume to continue
```

## Graceful Degradation

- If a source artifact is missing: skip it (include a note in context-summary.md)
- If the feature directory is not found: run at project level, summarize constitution.md
